title: AHK-CU
description: AHK-Cu (L-alanyl-L-histidyl-L-lysine-copper complex) is a tripeptide-copper complex that acts as a growth factor for differentiated cells. It stimulates dermal fibroblast proliferation, increases vascular endothelial growth factor production, and has been studied primarily for its effects on hair follicle growth and dermal papilla cell function.

research.title: The effect of tripeptide-copper complex on human hair growth in vitro
research.summary: AHK-Cu at concentrations of 10⁻¹² to 10⁻⁹ M stimulated human hair follicle elongation and dermal papilla cell proliferation, while reducing apoptosis markers by elevating the Bcl-2/Bax ratio and reducing cleaved caspase-3 levels.

sentiment.summary: User experiences are extremely limited with only one post mentioning AHK-Cu topically for hair growth, with no detailed feedback on results. The lack of substantial user reports prevents meaningful sentiment analysis beyond academic interest in the compound.

effects.label: Concentration Range:
effects.description: Effective at extremely low concentrations (10⁻¹² to 10⁻⁹ M) in laboratory studies

effects.label: Hair Growth:
effects.description: Demonstrated positive effects on human hair follicle growth in ex vivo studies

effects.label: Limited Human Data:
effects.description: Minimal user reports available to confirm real-world topical application effectiveness

effects.label: Topical Application:
effects.description: User interest focuses on topical serum formulation, though optimal delivery methods remain unclear

dosage.label: Research Concentrations:
dosage.description: Studies used 10⁻¹² to 10⁻⁹ M (picomolar to nanomolar range) with 10⁻⁹ M showing optimal effects

dosage.label: Topical Formulation:
dosage.description: Users seeking guidance on creating topical serums but no established protocols available

dosage.label: Application Method:
dosage.description: Intended for topical use on scalp, though specific concentration recommendations for consumer products lacking

dosage.label: Frequency Unknown:
dosage.description: No established dosing schedule for topical application in available user reports

sideEffects.label: No Reported Side Effects:
sideEffects.description: Research studies did not identify adverse effects at tested concentrations

sideEffects.label: Limited Safety Data:
sideEffects.description: Lack of long-term human studies on topical application

sideEffects.label: Formulation Challenges:
sideEffects.description: Users uncertain about proper preparation methods for topical use

sideEffects.label: Unknown Interactions:
sideEffects.description: No data available on potential interactions with other hair growth treatments

availability.label: Research Chemical Status:
availability.description: Available for purchase as research peptide but limited commercial formulations

availability.label: DIY Formulation:
availability.description: Users attempting to create their own topical serums due to lack of ready-made products

availability.label: Limited Commercial Products:
availability.description: Not widely available in mainstream hair care or supplement products
